content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(mod_monolith)
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months")
H: store("PostgreSQL") ⇒ prefer(low_ops)
P: traffic(modest) → fast_ship
R: !split(post_release) ∧ !slice_ready_modules
A: monolith_now

[AUDIT]
Goal: decide(modular_monolith).
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("4 months").
Hypothesis: store("PostgreSQL") implies prefer(low ops).
Plan: traffic(modest) then fast shipping.
Risk: high-risk split(post_release) and high-risk split-ready modules.
Answer target: ship modular_monolith now.
